# Alpha Subagent Handoff Template

Status: Scaffolded.
Audience: AI agents, maintainers.

## Role

Subagent:

Source brief:

## Inputs

Task:

## Output Required

- Findings or changes.
- Exact file paths.
- Commands run.
- Risks.
- Unresolved questions.
- Whether issue closure is supported by evidence.
